visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white lace off-the-shoulder top and a cow-print bucket hat, pushes a metal shopping cart down a wide aisle of a Costco warehouse. Inside the cart are two oversized plush cat pillows: one grey with a grumpy face and one white with a pink bow. The lighting is bright and typical of a retail warehouse. (2) The camera zooms in on the plush pillows as the woman reaches in to adjust them. The grey cat plush has distinctive green embroidered eyes and a large pink nose, while the white cat (Marie) features a pink bow and blue eyes. Shelves filled with stacked luggage and household goods are visible in the background. (3) The woman lifts the large white cat plush out of the cart and holds it against her chest to show that it is roughly the size of her torso. She smiles broadly at the camera, gesturing toward the plush's texture. (4) She holds both large plushies simultaneously, one in each hand, while standing in front of the cart. Other shoppers in casual clothing are seen moving in the distant background aisles. (5) The woman stands next to the cart, hugging the white plush and stroking its surface, demonstrating its softness and volume for the viewer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 超可愛的 最新的. (2) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 瑪麗貓、路西法只要655元. [Slogan]: 迪士尼 大頭貓貓抱枕. [Subtitle]: 655元 有兩款 一個是路西法. (3) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 另一個是綁著蝴蝶結的瑪麗貓. (4) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好好看喔 還綁沖天炮好可愛. (5) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 他真的很厚耶 你看. (6) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 他有成人的胸膛這麼大. [Subtitle]: 他有成人的胸膛這麼大. (7) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 比娃娃還實用. (8) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 一就是不管擺著 或靠著都很棒. (9) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 很柔順舒服. [Subtitle]: 最重要是他的柔 他的觸感很柔順很舒服. (10) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 阿.. 一個是反派 一個是正派 我都喜歡. (11) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 都買都買. [Subtitle]: 都買都買. (12) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你想要哪一個呢 留言告訴我. (13) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你要送大家啊?. (14) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 沒有啊 哈哈哈.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 shoppers visible in the background aisles at various points.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman wearing a white lace off-the-shoulder top, blue jeans, and a black-and-white cow-print bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large-scale retail warehouse (Costco) with high ceilings, concrete floors, and tall industrial shelving units stacked with bulk merchandise including suitcases and pallets of goods.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high vocal arousal and a bright, friendly pitch, describing a product excitedly. An upbeat acoustic pop track with rhythmic guitar strumming plays continuously in the background. (2) A soft percussive 'thud' sound occurs as a large object is shifted, followed by a synthetic 'pop' sound effect that accompanies a text transition. (3) A second female voice laughs briefly in the background, interacting with the primary speaker. (4) Multiple 'ding' sound effects are used as sonic punctuation between descriptive sentences. (5) The primary voice continues at a rapid, energetic pace while the music remains consistent in tempo and volume until the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Features -> Demonstration -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend new Disney-branded plush cat pillows found at a Costco warehouse store, highlighting their price, size, and soft texture to encourage viewers to purchase them or engage with the content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically mentions the price (655 TWD), the location (Costco), and asks viewers to comment on which version they prefer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of visual and auditory cues typical of social media marketing trends to grab attention quickly.
